message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

package "db" {
  interface ConnectionDB {
  }

  class ConnectionDBMySQL {
    # connection : Connection
    + ConnectionDBMySQL()
    + getInstance() : ConnectionDBMySQL
    + getDb() : Connection
  }

  class LazyHolderDB {
    - final INSTANCE : ConnectionDBMySQL
  }
}

package "gui" {
  package "controller" {
    class OfferController {
      # FAQ : ListView
      # answerQuestion : JButtonBar
      # update : JButtonBar
      # updat : JButtonBar
      # newQuestion : JButtonBar
      # rateArea : JButtonBar
      # handleNewQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      # handleNewAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      # handleUpdateQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      # handleUpdateAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      # handleDeleteQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      # handleDeleteAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      # handleUpdateScoreQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      # handleUpdateScoreAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
    }

    class NewQuestionController {
      # questionArea : JTextArea
      # postQuestion : JButtonBar
      # cancel : JButtonBar
      # handleNewQuestionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      # cancellactionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
    }

    class NewAnswerController {
      # answerArea : JTextArea
      # postAnswer : JButtonBar
      # cancel : JButtonBar
      # handleNewAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      # cancell(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
    }

    class LoadView {
      + load(name:xml : Parent) : Parent
      + changeScreen(actionEvent : ActionEvent, view : String) : void
    }
  }
}

package "business" {
  class FAQFacade {
    + getQuestionById(id : int) : Question
    + getAnswerById(id : int) : Answer
    + createQuestion(id : int, userId : int, offerId : int, answerId : int, question : String, score : int) : Question
    + createAnswer(id : int, userId : int, answer : String, score : int) : Answer
    + getQuestionsByOfferId(offerId : int) : ArrayList<Question>
    + getAnswersByOfferId(offerId : int) : ArrayList<Answer>
    + updateQuestionScored(id : int, userId : int, offerId : int, answerId : int, question : String, score : int) : Question
    + updateAnswerScored(id : int, userId : int, answer : String, score : int) : Answer
    + deleteQuestion(id : int) : boolean
    + deleteAnswer(id : int) : boolean
  }

  class Question {
    # questionId : int
    # content : String
    # score : int
    # answerId : int
    # userId : int
    # offerId : int
    + Question()
    + getQuestionId() : int
    + getContent() : String
    + getAnswer() : Answer
    + getUserId() : int
    + getOfferId() : int
    + setId(id) : void
    + setContent(content:String) : void
    + setAnswer(answer:Answer) : void
    + setScore(score:int) : void
    + setUserId(userId:int) : void
    + setOfferId(categoryId:int) : void
  }

  class Answer {
    # answerId : int
    # content : String
    # score : int
    # userId : int
    + Answer()
    + getAnswerId() : int
    + getContent() : String
    + getScore() : int
    + getUserId() : int
    + setId(id) : void
    + setContent(content:String) : void
    + setScore(score:int) : void
    + setUserId(userId:int) : void
  }

  class SessionFacade {
    + SessionFacade()
    + getUser() : User
  }
}

package "dao" {
  interface DAO {
    find(id : int) : T
    create(T obj) : T
    update(T obj) : T
    delete(T obj) : boolean
  }

  class AnswerDao {
    # OfferDao()
    + getInstance() : QuestionDao
    + LazyHolder()
    + getAnswersByOfferId(offerId : int) : ArrayList<Answer>
    + answerExists(id : int) : boolean
  }

  class QuestionDao {
    # OfferDao()
    + getInstance() : QuestionDao
    + LazyHolder()
    + getQuestionsByOfferId(id : int) : ArrayList<Question>
    + questionExists(id : int) : boolean
    + hasAnAnswer(id : int) : boolean
  }

  abstract class AbstractFactoryDao {
    - final connectionDB : ConnectionDB
    + getFactory(type : TypeDB) : AbstractFactoryDao
    + getAnswerDao() : AnswerDao
    + getQuestionDao() : QuestionDao
  }

  class AnswerDaoMySQL {
  }

  class QuestionDaoMySQL {
  }

  class FactoryDaoMySQL {
  }
}

ConnectionDBMySQL ..|> ConnectionDB
LazyHolderDB --* ConnectionDBMySQL

ConnectionDBMySQL -- LazyHolderDB

OfferController ..> NewQuestionController
OfferController ..> NewAnswerController
OfferController ..> LoadView

OfferController --> FAQFacade
NewQuestionController --> FAQFacade
NewAnswerController --> FAQFacade

FAQFacade --> Question
FAQFacade --> Answer
FAQFacade --> SessionFacade

FAQFacade ..> AnswerDao
FAQFacade ..> QuestionDao

AnswerDao ..|> DAO
QuestionDao ..|> DAO

AnswerDaoMySQL --|> AnswerDao
QuestionDaoMySQL --|> QuestionDao

FactoryDaoMySQL --|> AbstractFactoryDao

AbstractFactoryDao --> AnswerDao
AbstractFactoryDao --> QuestionDao

AnswerDaoMySQL ..> AbstractFactoryDao
QuestionDaoMySQL ..> AbstractFactoryDao

Question --> Answer

@enduml
```
